Name: Rogin Ifland
Bio: To ensure your home makes an unforgettable first impression on potential buyers, I work hand-in-hand with Rogin who serves as the marketing and logistical powerhouse of my team. She is dedicated entirely to the seamless, stress-free preparation and launch of your home on the market. From scheduling our professional videographers and ordering yard signs to meticulously entering your home's data so it syndicates flawlessly across Redfin and the MLS, she handles the vital details behind the scenes. Her specialized support ensures your listing looks absolutely pristine the moment it goes live, allowing me to focus my energy entirely on pricing strategy, buyer outreach, and negotiating top dollar for your home.

Name: Beth Davis
Bio: Once your offer is accepted and we are officially under contract, Beth steps in to serve as our dedicated escrow and paperwork champion. Real estate transactions involve an intense timeline of strict deadlines, legal disclosures, and financial milestones, and Beth's sole focus is keeping our deal moving perfectly on track for a smooth closing. She collaborates directly with you, the title company, lenders, and the opposing agent to ensure every piece of compliance paperwork is flawlessly executed and submitted on time. With them meticulously managing the administrative timeline, you can breathe easy knowing no detail is overlooked, allowing me to stay focused on overseeing the full transaction and advising you through the inspection, appraisal, and final negotiations.

Name: Ben Coffee
Bio: Behind the scenes of our journey is my Sales Manager, a veteran real estate leader who oversees our local market operations and ensures our team always delivers the highest standard of service. While I am your primary point of contact and dedicated advocate, my Sales Manager acts as a trusted strategic advisor, providing an extra layer of expert oversight, market insight, and resource backing for our transaction. Having their leadership integrated into my workflow means you don't just get my individual expertise; you have a built-in executive support system ensuring that your sale or purchase is executed with the utmost precision and professional excellence. Ben is the Sales Manager for Redfin's Seattle-North Market, ranging from Shoreline to Bellingham.

Name: Christina Woollen
Bio: Buying, selling, or investing - let’s make it an adventure you’ll actually enjoy. My goal is simple: to get you the best outcome while keeping you informed, supported, and genuinely cared for every step of the way. From our first chat to closing day and beyond, I’ll be there to guide you, answer your questions, and celebrate every win. Backed by the Redfin team, I bring market insight, helpful tools, and a people-first approach. Consistently earning 5-star reviews, I’m here to help you step into a place that truly feels like home.

Name: Rick Wright
Bio: You can find the right place at the right time, and it's my privilege to guide you safely along that journey. To do that, I keep my eyes on property values and market trends, and work closely with a large network to be sure things go smoothly. With a collaborative approach, I'll equip you with info and tools to confidently buy and sell homes. I know how challenging a move can be. First licensed in 2007 in Seattle, I've had stints in the Nashville and Washington DC markets as well as locally from Bonney Lake up to Bellingham. A musician, coffee enthusiast and teacher turned realtor, I am lucky to live in my favorite place on earth here in the PNW with my lovely wife, two children and two cats. I can’t wait to get to work with you.

Name: Leslie Bontecou
Bio:
Coverage Area: North Sound
To make sure my clients never miss out on seeing a hot new listing the moment it hits the market, I am backed by my incredible group of licensed, local real estate professional team called Associate Agents. Think of them as an on-the-ground extension of me - fully integrated members of my team who step in to open doors, host tours, or attend inspections whenever I’m tied up negotiating an offer or advocating for another client. We collaborate seamlessly behind the scenes, meaning every note and piece of feedback from your home visits comes straight back to me so we can strategize our next move. This teamwork ensures you get the absolute best of both worlds: my dedicated contract expertise and negotiation guidance, paired with a responsive, hyper-local team ready to move at lightning speed whenever you need us.
